ModMetaData.name: Pawn Diary — Example Adapter (template)
ModMetaData.author: aimmlegate
ModMetaData.description: Developer template for Pawn Diary integration adapters. Submits one harmless example diary event per in-game day through the public PawnDiaryApi, demonstrating the full contract: request building, adapter-owned localization, and the External-domain group XML that claims the eventKey. Not intended for normal play — copy this folder to start a real adapter (see INTEGRATIONS.md in the Pawn Diary repo).
